schemaVersion.description: Contract schema version used to interpret the error payload.

message.description: Human-readable error message suitable for logs and developer diagnostics.

runId.description: Opaque run identifier associated with the failed execution, if available.

providerId.description: Identifier of the provider associated with the failure, if execution reached a provider.

retryable.description: Whether retrying the same request may succeed.

retryAfterMs.description: Optional suggested delay before retrying, in milliseconds.

details.description: Optional structured diagnostic details. It must not contain raw secrets.
